title: Ubiquiti security advisory (AV26-258)
description: On March 18, 2026, Ubiquiti published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following product:
products: UniFi Network application  version 10.1.85 and prior
UniFi Network application  version 10.2.93 and prior
UniFi Network application  version 9.0.114 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
